E=6 through density of ideas and production.

cross_references.relationship: EXPERIMENTAL HIP-HOP! Both push Seattle hip-hop beyond genre. Cosmic themes. Experimental production.
EXPERIMENTAL! Same experimental orbit. Butler + Shabazz Palaces lineage.
INDEPENDENCE! Both self-released. Macklemore LLC digital to Cosmic Zingaro streaming. Independence evolves.
GENRE-BLENDING! Both experimental Seattle hip-hop. Same tradition of refusing genre boundaries.
